steps: Create or sign in at https://ads.google.com
Set account time zone and currency to USD
Enable auto-tagging: Account settings → Auto-tagging → ON
Link GA4: Admin → Product links → Google Analytics → Link property for worldcupstats.org
Add GitHub secret VITE_GA4_MEASUREMENT_ID with your G-XXXXXXXXXX ID, then redeploy
In GA4: Admin → Events — verify page_view and session_start appear after consent + traffic
Mark engaged sessions: Admin → Events → mark session_start as key event (or use built-in engaged_session metric)
Mark sign_up as key event for optional auth conversion tracking
In Google Ads: Goals → Conversions → New conversion action → Import → Google Analytics 4 properties
Import engaged session (or session_start) and optionally sign_up as primary optimization goal

adGroups.name: Schedule and Dates
descriptions: Key dates, opening match, and final for FIFA World Cup 2026. Updated schedule with venues.
Browse the full World Cup 2026 fixture list — dates, times, and stadiums in your timezone.

adGroups.name: Squads and Groups
descriptions: Browse every national team squad for FIFA World Cup 2026 with player lists and team links.
See all 12 groups and which teams are in each. Updated rosters for every nation.

checks: Search terms report: add irrelevant queries as negative keywords
Pause keywords with 50+ impressions and 0 clicks
CTR target above 3%; rewrite ads if below 1%
Avg CPC should stay under $0.50; raise max CPC to $0.75 only if zero impressions
GA4 bounce rate on landing pages target below 70%
Shift budget toward ad group with better engagement before increasing daily budget

budgetRamp.when: After 100+ clicks with acceptable engaged-session rate and clean search terms
